label: About
title: About Edge Learning Benchmark Field
short_blurb: A daily generated front page where the image is the interface.
body: Daily Frontpage is a daily generated interactive front page. Each edition starts from recent saved signals and source research, becomes a new image-led scene, and stays explorable in the archive. The image is the interface: visible marks, objects, and surfaces in the scene open the real sources that shaped the day.

This iteration began with 92 recent saved-signal files and 79 captured links, then narrowed the page to 9 source windows around Claude Fable 5 101: The Complete Guide (+ 141 Thorough Prompts Across Every Role) and @simicvm: Your travel itinerary, but as a tiny living 3D world. Actual geography, real-time..., plus 7 more. A source image from sidsaladi.substack.com helped set the palette, contrast, edge behavior, and gesture. The scene became Edge Learning Benchmark Field: Bright minimal game-space surface, composition archetype: game-space surface, camera/plate grammar: overhead scan. A broad off-white benchmark field holds one quiet hero interruption near center, a second hero crop off the lower edge, and a restrained three-column band of tiny apertures. After the image was made, a plate-reading pass mapped 9 visible regions and the mask audit tightened them against central circular aperture with portrait silhouette, lower rounded terrain crop, and middle-band rounded image slits.

typography.body_family: 'DFE Newsreader', Iowan Old Style, Georgia, serif
typography.rationale: Fraunces gives the title an organic, seed-label quality; Newsreader keeps the explanation calm and readable.
